sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes NFS "EBUSY: resource busy or locked" errors during actions/checkout@v4 on self-hosted 1-gpu-runner jobs.
Problem
Self-hosted runners on NFS-backed storage encounter checkout failures when:

Lingering Python processes from previous test runs hold open file handles
NFS creates .nfs* temp

sglang.title: [CI] fix triggered by a non-run-ci label
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
run-ci label behavior update

Existing workflows are only triggered by the synchronize event. The labeled event no longer triggers CI runs.
The run-ci label is not automatically added to new pull requests.

How to run CI for a pull request

The PR author opens a pull request.
An SGLang collaborator

sglang.title: [CI] remove auto-labeling `run-ci` label.

Purpose
As format.sh is deprecated by #16015 for 8 months, now we can safely remove it.


 Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist
